---
title: "Publications"
---

### Published Articles

<ol reversed>

  <li>
    Ventura, M., Jacques, J., & Zuccolotto, P., (2026) Multivariate Latent Class Modeling of Rating Data for Investigating the Sustainability Perception and the Economic Behavior in the Made in Italy Sector. <i>Statistical Papers</i>. Accepted for Publication.
  </li>

  <li>
    Ventura, M., Macis, A., Manisera, M., & Zuccolotto, P., (2026) Measuring synesthetic experience of museum visitors using multi-point semantic differential scales. <i>Quality and Quantity</i>. Accepted for Publication.
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s11135-026-02768-0" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
    </a>
    <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2026 - QQ - Ventura et al - Synesthetic experience.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>
  
<li>
  Ventura, M., Jacques, J., & Zuccolotto, P. (2025). Model-Based Clustering of Multivariate Rating Data Accounting for Feeling and Uncertainty. <i>Journal of Classification</i>, 1-22. 

  <div class="d-flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2 mb-3">
  <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00357-025-09521-6" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
  <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
  </a>
  <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2025 - JoC - Ventura et al - Model-based Clustering.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
  </a>
  <a href="https://github.com/MatteoVentura/CUBClustR" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
  <i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> R Package
  </a>
  <a href="Tutorials/MLCCUB/MLCCUB_tutorial.html" class="pub-link" onclick="window.open(this.href, '_self'); return false;">
  <i class="bi bi-laptop"></i> Tutorial & Code
  </a>
  </div>
</li>
  
  <li>
    Simonetto, A., Ventura, M. (2025) Distance Measures for Unweighted Undirected Networks: a comparison study. <i>Australian and New Zealand Journal of Statistics.</i>
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.1111/anzs.70015" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
    </a>
    <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2025 - ANZJS - Simonetto and Ventura - Distance measures.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    Ventura, M., Macis, A., Manisera, M., & Zuccolotto, P. (2024). On the equivalence of two mixture models for rating data. <i>Advances in Statistical Analysis</i>, <b>1</b>(25), 70–86. 
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s10182-024-00513-2" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
    </a>
    <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2024 - AStA - Ventura et al - On the equivalence.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    Manisera, M., Migliorati, M., Ventura, M., & Zuccolotto, P. (2024). A mixture model for the analysis of categorical variables measured on five-point semantic differential scales. <i>Austrian Journal of Statistics</i>, <b>53</b>(3), 70–86. 
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.17713/ajs.v53i3.1744" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
    </a>
    <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2023 - AJS - Manisera et al - A mixture model.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    Ventura, M., & Ricciardi, R. (2022). Exploring financial microblogs: Analysis of users’ trading profiles with multivariate statistical methods. <i>Statistica e Applicazioni</i>, <b>20</b>(1), 61-78. 
    <a href="1026350/999999_000051" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
    </a>
    <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2022 - Statistica e Applicazioni - Ventura and Ricciardi - Exploring Financial Microblogs.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    Ghiglieno, I., Simonetto, A., Sperandio, G., Ventura, M., Gatti, F., Donna, P., Tonni, M., Valenti, L., & Gilioli, G. (2021). Impact of environmental conditions and management on soil arthropods communities in vineyard ecosystems. <i>Sustainability</i>, <b>13</b>(21), 11999. 
    <a href="https://doi.org/10.3390/su132111999" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI
    </a>
    <a href="pdf_papers/journals/2021 - Sustainability - Ghiglieno et al - Impact of environmental conditions.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

</ol>


### Conference Proceedings

<ol reversed>

  <li>
    Ventura, M., Karlis, D., Jacques, J., Zuccolotto, P., Estimation of High-Dimensional Copula-Based CUB Models using Composite Likelihood, [Short paper]. In K. Jajuga, P. Brito, F. Greselin, M. Zenga, & F. Denti (Eds.), <i>Springer Series “Studies in Classification, Data Analysis, and Knowledge Organization”</i>.
    <a href="pdf_papers/conf_proc/2026 - IFCS - Ventura et al.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>
  
  <li>
    Ventura, M., Jacques, J., & Zuccolotto, P. (2025). Model-Based Clustering of Multivariate Rating Data to Evaluate Consumer Perceptions on Sustainability. In G. Boccuzzo et al. (Eds.), <i>IES 2025 - Statistical Methods for Evaluation and Quality</i>. (pp. 637-642). Cleup sc. ISBN: 9788854958494
    <a href="pdf_papers/conf_proc/2025 - IES - Ventura et al.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    Ventura, M., Jacques, J., & Zuccolotto, P. (2025). Clustering multivariate rating data within the CUB framework. In A. Pollice & P. Mariani (Eds.), <i>52nd Scientific Meeting of the Italian Statistical Society – Bari, 17-20 June 2024</i>. (pp. 637-642). Springer. ISBN: 9783031644467.
    <a href="pdf_papers/conf_proc/2024 - SIS - Ventura et al.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

  <li>
    Simonetto, A., Ventura, M., & Gilioli, G. (2022). An explorative analysis of different distance metrics to compare unweighted undirected networks. In A. Balzanella, M. Bini, C. Cavicchia, & R. Verde (Eds.), <i>51st Scientific Meeting of the Italian Statistical Society – Caserta, 22-24 June 2022</i> (pp. 1522-1527). Pearson. ISBN: 9788891932310.
    <a href="pdf_papers/conf_proc/2022 - SIS - Simonetto et al.pdf" target="_blank" class="pub-link">
      <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
    </a>
  </li>

</ol>

### Submitted Articles

<ol reversed>
  <li> Carloni E., Codini A. P., Ventura M., Does country of origin extend to sustainable products? The case of sustainable Made in Italy </li>
</ol>
